en: Now when they drew near to Jerusalem, to Bethphage and Bethany, at the Mount of Olives, Jesus sent two of his disciples
zh: 他們走近耶路撒冷，到了伯法其和伯大尼，來到橄欖山那裡，耶穌派了兩個門徒，

en: and said to them, "Go into the village in front of you, and immediately as you enter it you will find a colt tied, on which no one has ever sat. Untie it and bring it.
zh: 對他們說：“你們往對面的村子裡去，一進去，就會看見一頭小驢拴在那裡，是沒有人騎過的，把牠解開牽來。

en: If anyone says to you, 'Why are you doing this?' say, 'The Lord has need of it and will send it back here immediately.'"
zh: 如果有人問你們：‘為甚麼這樣作？’你們就說：‘主需要牠，並且很快會送還到這裡來。’”

en: And they went away and found a colt tied at a door outside in the street, and they untied it.
zh: 門徒去了，就發現一頭小驢，拴在門外的街上，就把牠解開。

en: And some of those standing there said to them, "What are you doing, untying the colt?"
zh: 站在那裡的人有的問他們說：“你們為甚麼解牠？”

en: And they told them what Jesus had said, and they let them go.
zh: 門徒照著耶穌所說的話回答他們，那些人就讓他們牽走了。

en: And they brought the colt to Jesus and threw their cloaks on it, and he sat on it.
zh: 門徒把小驢牽到耶穌那裡，把自己的衣服搭在上面，耶穌就騎了上去。

en: And many spread their cloaks on the road, and others spread leafy branches that they had cut from the fields.
zh: 許多人把衣服鋪在路上，還有人從田野裡砍了些樹枝也鋪在路上。

en: And those who went before and those who followed were shouting, "Hosanna! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord!
zh: 前行後隨的人都喊著說： “‘和散那’， 奉主名來的是應當稱頌的！

en: Blessed is the coming kingdom of our father David! Hosanna in the highest!"
zh: 那將要來臨的， 我們祖先大衛的國是應當稱頌的！ 高天之上當唱‘和散那’！”

en: And he entered Jerusalem and went into the temple. And when he had looked around at everything, as it was already late, he went out to Bethany with the twelve.
zh: 耶穌到了耶路撒冷，進入聖殿，察看了一切，因為時候已經不早，就和十二門徒出城往伯大尼去。

en: On the following day, when they came from Bethany, he was hungry.
zh: 第二天他們從伯大尼出來，耶穌餓了。

en: And seeing in the distance a fig tree in leaf, he went to see if he could find anything on it. When he came to it, he found nothing but leaves, for it was not the season for figs.
zh: 他遠遠看見一棵長滿了葉子的無花果樹，就走過去，看看是否可以在樹上找到甚麼。到了樹下，除了葉子甚麼也找不著，因為這不是收無花果的時候。

en: And he said to it, "May no one ever eat fruit from you again." And his disciples heard it.
zh: 耶穌對樹說：“永遠再沒有人吃你的果子了！”他的門徒也聽見了。

en: And they came to Jerusalem. And he entered the temple and began to drive out those who sold and those who bought in the temple, and he overturned the tables of the money-changers and the seats of those who sold pigeons.
zh: 他們來到耶路撒冷。耶穌進了聖殿，就把殿裡作買賣的人趕走，又推倒找換銀錢的人的桌子，和賣鴿子的人的凳子；

en: And he would not allow anyone to carry anything through the temple.
zh: 不許人拿著器皿穿過聖殿。

en: And he was teaching them and saying to them, "Is it not written, 'My house shall be called a house of prayer for all the nations'? But you have made it a den of robbers."
zh: 他又教訓眾人說：“經上不是寫著 ‘我的殿要稱為萬國禱告的殿’嗎？ 你們竟把它弄成賊窩了。”

en: And the chief priests and the scribes heard it and were seeking a way to destroy him, for they feared him, because all the crowd was astonished at his teaching.
zh: 祭司長和經學家聽見了，就想辦法怎樣除掉耶穌，卻又怕他，因為群眾都希奇他的教訓。

en: And when evening came they went out of the city.
zh: 到了晚上，他們就到城外去。

en: As they passed by in the morning, they saw the fig tree withered away to its roots.
zh: 早晨，他們經過的時候，看見那棵無花果樹連根都枯萎了。

en: And Peter remembered and said to him, "Rabbi, look! The fig tree that you cursed has withered."
zh: 彼得想起來就對耶穌說：“拉比，請看，你所咒詛的無花果樹，已經枯萎了。”

en: And Jesus answered them, "Have faith in God.
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“你們對 神要有信心 。

en: Truly, I say to you, whoever says to this mountain, 'Be taken up and thrown into the sea,' and does not doubt in his heart, but believes that what he says will come to pass, it will be done for him.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，無論甚麼人對這座山說‘移開，投到海裡’，只要他心裡不懷疑，相信他所說的一定能夠成就，就必給他成就。

en: Therefore I tell you, whatever you ask in prayer, believe that you have received it, and it will be yours.
zh: 所以我告訴你們，凡是你們禱告祈求的，只要相信能夠得到，就必得到。

en: And whenever you stand praying, forgive, if you have anything against anyone, so that your Father also who is in heaven may forgive you your trespasses."
zh: 你們站著禱告的時候，如果有誰得罪了你們，就該饒恕他，好使你們的天父也饒恕你們的過犯。”
他們又來到耶路撒冷。耶穌在殿裡行走的時候，祭司長、經學家和長老來到他跟前，

en: And they came again to Jerusalem. And as he was walking in the temple, the chief priests and the scribes and the elders came to him,
zh: 問他：“你憑甚麼權柄作這些事？誰給你權柄作這些事？”

en: and they said to him, "By what authority are you doing these things, or who gave you this authority to do them?"
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我要問你們一句話，你們回答了我，我就告訴你們我憑甚麼權柄作這些事。

en: Jesus said to them, "I will ask you one question; answer me, and I will tell you by what authority I do these things.
zh: 約翰的洗禮是從天上來的，還是從人來的呢？你們回答我吧。”

en: Was the baptism of John from heaven or from man? Answer me."
zh: 他們就彼此議論：“如果我們說‘是從天上來的’，他就會說‘那你們為甚麼不信他呢？’

en: And they discussed it with one another, saying, "If we say, 'From heaven,' he will say, 'Why then did you not believe him?'
zh: 如果我們說‘是從人來的’……”他們害怕群眾，因為眾人都認為約翰的確是先知。

en: But shall we say, 'From man'?"- they were afraid of the people, for they all held that John really was a prophet.
zh: 於是他們回答耶穌：“我們不知道。”耶穌對他們說：“我也不告訴你們我憑甚麼權柄作這些事。”

en: So they answered Jesus, "We do not know." And Jesus said to them, "Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things."
